name: Nawa
description: She is a lego girl who has brown hair, purple ears or horns, kind, has a purple jacket thats only showing the lower half of her torso and drooping off her shoulders, showing her exposed arms and her black body suit, revealing her arms and legs, her boots are purple, she sometimes wears a cow bell around her neck, and she sometimes even has scales on her cheeks*
